response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi', although the performer sings different lines in the pre-chorus and bridge. The 'Fansa' reference is a partial snippet, so I have manually transcribed the missing verses. Timing is strictly tied to the vocal audio, with pauses between phrases resulting in split subtitle blocks. I have also included the on-screen title card for the second song at 01:59.000. All entries adhere to the character limit and prevent early cutoffs.

subtitles.original: 受け止めてね 愛のこもったわがままソング
subtitles.english: Take into your heart my self-indulgent love song

subtitles.original: ファンサしちゃうぞ
subtitles.english: I'm gonna fan-service you!

subtitles.original: はぁ…終わりが近づく
subtitles.english: Ah... The end is near...

subtitles.original: 寂しいな
subtitles.english: I'm so sad...

subtitles.original: 嬉しいな
subtitles.english: But I'm happy!

subtitles.original: 君に 愛のビームを あげるよ！
subtitles.english: I'll cast a beam of love to you!

subtitles.original: 約束！
subtitles.english: Promise!

subtitles.original: 優しさに溢れている言葉も
subtitles.english: Words overflowing with kindness,

subtitles.original: 心無い誰かの言葉さえも
subtitles.english: and even the heartless words of someone...

subtitles.original: 必要なんだ 必要なんだ
subtitles.english: They're both necessary, necessary,

subtitles.original: 強くなろう
subtitles.english: to become stronger.

subtitles.original: 好きに叫べ！もっと！
subtitles.english: Shout as you like! More!

subtitles.original: 楽しんじゃえ！もっと！
subtitles.english: Enjoy yourself! More!

subtitles.original: 忘れないで 特別な日になりますように
subtitles.english: Don't forget, I hope it becomes a special day.

subtitles.original: 共に歌おう ずっと
subtitles.english: Let's sing together forever.

subtitles.original: 共に歩もう ずっと
subtitles.english: Let's walk together forever.

subtitles.original: 合言葉は とびきりの L・O・V・E
subtitles.english: The password is an extraordinary L-O-V-E!

subtitles.original: 好きになって！もっと！
subtitles.english: Fall in love with me! More!

subtitles.original: 私を見て！もっと！
subtitles.english: Look at me! More!

subtitles.original: 恩返しは 愛のこもった投げキッスで
subtitles.english: My reward to you is a blown kiss full of love.

subtitles.original: 虜にする！もっと！
subtitles.english: I'll captivate you! More!

subtitles.original: 夢を見せる！もっと！
subtitles.english: I'll show you dreams! More!

subtitles.original: 楽しんでね 愛のこもったスペシャルナイト
subtitles.english: Please enjoy this special night full of love.

subtitles.original: ファンサしちゃうぞ
subtitles.english: I'm gonna fan-service you!

subtitles.original: ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星
subtitles.english: Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi

subtitles.original: 突然降る夕立 あぁ傘もないや嫌
subtitles.english: A sudden evening shower, no umbrella, ugh

subtitles.original: 空のご機嫌なんか知らない
subtitles.english: Why would I know how the sky feels?

subtitles.original: 季節の変わり目の服は 何着りゃいいんだろ
subtitles.english: What should I wear for the changing seasons?

subtitles.original: 春と秋 どこいっちゃったんだよ
subtitles.english: Where did spring and autumn go?

subtitles.original: 息も出来ない 情報の圧力
subtitles.english: I can't even breathe, it's the pressure of info

subtitles.original: めまいの螺旋だ わたしはどこにいる
subtitles.english: A spiral of dizziness, where am I?

subtitles.original: こんなに こんなに 息の音がするのに
subtitles.english: Even though I can hear my own breathing clearly

subtitles.original: 変だね 世界の音がしない
subtitles.english: It's strange, I can't hear the world's sounds

subtitles.original: 足りない 足りない 誰にも聞かせられない
subtitles.english: It's not enough, I can't let anyone hear it

subtitles.original: 殴り書きみたいな音 出せない状態で叫んだよ
subtitles.english: I shouted, unable to even make scribbled sounds

subtitles.original: ありのままなんて 誰に見せるんだ
subtitles.english: To whom should I show my true self?

subtitles.original: 馬鹿な私は歌うだけ
subtitles.english: A fool like me just keeps on singing

subtitles.original: ぶちまけちゃおうか 星に
subtitles.english: Should I just vent it all to the stars?

subtitles.original: エリクサーに貼り替える作業も 何となくなんだ
subtitles.english: Changing strings to Elixirs is just something I do

subtitles.original: 欠けた爪を少し触る
subtitles.english: I lightly touch my chipped fingernail

subtitles.original: 半径300ミリの体で 必死に鳴いてる
subtitles.english: With this 300mm body, I'm crying out

subtitles.original: 音楽に取っちゃ ここが地球だな
subtitles.english: To music, this must be what Earth is

subtitles.original: 空気を吸い込んで 空を殴るよ
subtitles.english: I'll breathe in and strike at the sky

subtitles.original: なんにも出来ない 私は無力さ
subtitles.english: I can't do anything, I'm so powerless

subtitles.original: だけどさ その手で この弦を弾いたら
subtitles.english: But if I pluck these strings with these hands...

subtitles.original: 何かが変わって見えたような
subtitles.english: It felt like something began to change

subtitles.original: 眩しい 眩しい そんなに光るなよ
subtitles.english: It's too bright, too bright, don't shine like that

subtitles.original: 私のダサい影が より濃くなってしまうだろ
subtitles.english: My uncool shadow will only grow darker

subtitles.original: なんでこんな熱くなっちゃってんだ 止まらない
subtitles.english: Why have I become so heated? I can't stop

subtitles.original: 馬鹿な私は歌うだけ
subtitles.english: A fool like me just keeps on singing

subtitles.original: うるさいんだって 心臓
subtitles.english: My heart is just too loud

subtitles.original: 蒼い惑星 独りぼっち
subtitles.english: A blue planet, all alone

subtitles.original: いっぱいの音を聞いてきた
subtitles.english: I've listened to so many sounds

subtitles.original: 回り続けて幾億年
subtitles.english: Billions of years spent spinning...

subtitles.original: 一瞬...
subtitles.english: A single moment...
